titleStmt.title: SII 22.236: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 236. (A.R. No. 236 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, CHEYYAR TALUK, TIRUPPANAṄGĀḌU. ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. VIRUPPAṆṆA (VIRŪPĀKSHA II), SON OF HARIYAṆA (HARIHARA II)—Śaka 1310.

summary.p: The details of the date are given as Vibhava, Vṛiśchika, ba. 10, Monday, Hastā corresponding to A.D. 1388, November 23. The inscription records the appointment of a certain Śellappiḷḷaiyār Śaivaśēkharakkālāḷ by the temple authorities of Tiruppaṉaṅgāvuḍaiya-Nāyaṉār for the daily supply of water for the sacred bath of the deity, and for rearing a flower garden called the Dānaparipālana-nandavanam at Śiṟupaṉaṅgāḍu, for both of which duties he was granted 150 kuḻi of land as his jīvita, two house sites for residence and three nāḻi of offered rice every day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇṭaleśvara Arirāyavibhāṭaṉ bhāṣaikkut tappuvarāyara kaṇṭan muvarāyara kaṇṭan Uttara dakṣiṇa pūṟuvapaccima catusamudrādhipati śrīvira hariyaṇa Uṭaiyar kumāra viruppaṇa Uṭaiyaṟku cellāniṉṟa
śakābdam Āyirattu muṉṉūṟṟuorupatinmel cellāniṉṟa vipava samvaṟu sarattu viṟucciyanāyaṟṟu Amarapakṣattu tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum daśamiyum peṟṟa Attat til nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu kāliyūrko
ṭṭattil kaḻumalanāṭṭil pirammatecapaṟṟu tiruppaṉaṅkāṭu Āḷuṭaiyār tiruppaṉaṅkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭecuraṉ Aṟulicceyalpaṭi Ik koyilukku tirumaiñcaṇamum
Eṭuttu tirumeṟpūccum Amukka tirumālaiyum paṇippaṟṟa nilai Oṉṟum ciṟu paṉaṅkāṭṭil tānaparipālana tirunantavaṉam payiṟceyya nilai Oṉṟum Āka Inta nilai Iraṇṭum cokkaṉār makaṉ cellappiḷḷaiyār caivacekarakkālāṟ
ku kāṇiāṭciākak kuṭuttom Inta nilaikaḷukku civitamaṭaitta caṭai Erikiḻ vaṭakoṭṭil muṭivaḻaṅkiṉāṉ taṭi 2- m Ārumpūṇṭāṉ vaṭapātiyum cuppiṟa maṇiyaṉ taṭi 3- m kuṟuñcilvaṭṭamu māñcaṉ vammi pulampaniṉṟāṉ paṅkaṉ Āka
taṭi pattiṉāl kuḻi 100 5 10- m koyilil ṉāḷvaḻi peṟuñ coṟu muṉṉāḻiyum Ālālacuntaraṉ tiruvitikku teṟku maṉai Iraṇṭum maṉaippaṭappaiyum kaikkoṇṭu Inta nilaikaḷ tāḻvu varāmal naṭattakkaṭavārākavum Ippaṭikku I
ntak kāṇiāṭci viṟṟoṟṟi parigrahadāyatāṉaṅkaḷukkum Urittāvatākak kuṭuttom Ikkoyilil śrīmāheśvararum tāṉattārom Ippaṭikku Āṇṭa perumāḷ tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Āḻvāṉ tillaikkūttapaṭṭar Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku koyilkaṇakkup piramarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.236 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
